creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I figured it out. There are a lot of BCMWL5.INF/BCMWL5.SYS out there in 
the internet with slightly different PCI ProductID. It was a mismatch.
My card VendorID=0x14e4 (Broadcom), ProductID=0x4315 is working now with 
the corresponding BCMWL5.SYS driver in FreeBSD-70-RC1.

Since this PR was opened long time ago it probably can be closed now 
since in the modern OS versions this card works.

Yuri
